name: Kimi K2
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts, 384 experts (8 active + 1 shared/token), 61 layers, MLA attention
note: 1T-parameter MoE agentic model trained with the MuonClip optimizer; open-sourced under a modified MIT license.
tpsNote: Does not fit on a single RTX 4090 (24GB); practical Q4 quants need ~250-600GB combined RAM/VRAM, with heavy CPU/SSD offload reported at only ~5-10 tok/s

results.notes: MATH-500 [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]
General Tasks table (EM); cross-confirmed verbatim in GitHub README mirror and arXiv:2507.20534 Table 3
General Tasks table (EM); cross-confirmed in GitHub README mirror
GPQA-Diamond, avg@8; confirmed in GitHub README mirror and arXiv:2507.20534 Table 3
SimpleQA 'Correct' metric; confirmed in GitHub README mirror and arXiv:2507.20534 Table 3
IFEval Prompt Strict; confirmed in GitHub README mirror and arXiv:2507.20534 Table 3
Aider-Polyglot accuracy, from Coding Tasks table (GitHub README mirror)
SuperGPQA accuracy, from Math & STEM Tasks table (GitHub README mirror)
Humanity's Last Exam, text-only, no tools (non-thinking base model, much lower than the Thinking variant's 44.9); from GitHub README mirror

Tau2-Bench telecom domain, avg@4; confirmed directly in arXiv:2507.20534 (Kimi K2: Open Agentic Intelligence) Table 3 and GitHub README mirror. Tau2 retail (70.6) and airline (56.5) scores also published but have no matching taxonomy slug (only the telecom variant has a dedicated slug), so left out to avoid conflating with the original tau-bench.

TerminalBench score under the standard 'Terminus' harness (25.0); the model card also separately reports 30.0 under an in-house framework variant of the same benchmark -- Terminus figure used as the more standard/citable evaluation harness.

Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard v3, listed as 'Kimi K2 0711' ($0.55/$2.20 pricing, matching this model's price fields exactly). Data attributed to Artificial Analysis, independently measured. Not previously tracked for this model.

Arena.ai Text Arena Overall Elo for 'kimi-k2-0711-preview' -- rank 101/374, 27,610 votes, $0.60/$2.50 pricing and 131.1K context shown alongside it (release-date slug '0711' matches this model's exact July 11, 2025 release). Confirmed via the leaderboard's own embedded data table.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model. GitHub README (moonshotai/Kimi-K2, mirrors HF card) verified 1T total/32B active/384 experts/128K ctx/Modified MIT License and all 5 benchmark scores (LiveCodeBench 53.7, AIME24 69.6, MMLU 89.5, SWE-bench 65.8, MATH-500 97.4) verbatim. Exact release date July 11, 2025 confirmed via multiple sources (model's own '0711' version tag, Global Times, Wikipedia). Pricing $0.57/$2.30 per M tokens confirmed via OpenRouter/pricepertoken listings for 'Kimi K2 0711'. HF page itself was rate-limited (429) during this session but GitHub README mirror gave identical figures.
